issues.title: L1 Vault submission not completed
issues.detail: Expected l1_submitted=true (t) when L1 Vault is reachable. The lock record exists in pending state but has not been submitted to L1 (l1_tx_hash IS NULL). This breaks the critical path for lock confirmation and is a hard failure per the expected post-condition.

observations: Script exited with code 1 (expected 0)
Most recent lock (ID: 0x4bb80ceff1536a63d0555bb9579926d067f9906245d95dca505d793909cd84ec) has no l1_tx_hash
L1 anchoring did not occur in this sequence run
totalLocked() call succeeded and returned 120000000000000000 wei (1.2e17)
L1Vault address (0x07012aeF87C6E423c32F2f8eaF81762f63337260) is legitimate
Root cause: QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable is likely unset or invalid

issues.title: L1 anchoring transaction not submitted
issues.detail: The Consumer Lock sequence created a lock in the application database, but no corresponding L1 transaction hash was recorded. This indicates the lock submission to L1 failed or was never attempted. The script diagnostic message suggests QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY may be unset, preventing transaction signing.

issues.title: Missing l1_tx_hash in lock record
issues.detail: Lock 0x4bb80ceff1536a63d0555bb9579926d067f9906245d95dca505d793909cd84ec exists in the locks table but l1_tx_hash is null or empty. This breaks the chain of custody for the locked value.
